AboutPage.title: About Us
AboutPage.subtitle: Welcome to EcoShop — where precision meets innovation in eco-friendly solutions.
AboutPage.backgroundText1: Founded in 2016, EcoShop was born from a simple observation: artists, craftsmen, and professionals deserve better tools to maintain their equipment. What started as a small workshop in Sumy has grown into a leading manufacturer of premium eco-friendly solutions used by professionals worldwide.
AboutPage.journeyText: Our founder, a former industrial designer, noticed the frustration artists faced with generic eco products. He spent three years researching metallurgy, products geometry, and ergonomics to create the first EcoShop prototype. That prototype evolved into our flagship series of eco products, now trusted by thousands of professionals globally.
AboutPage.valuePrecisionText: Every EcoShop product is engineered with micron-level accuracy. We believe true craftsmanship starts with the right tools, honed to perfection.
AboutPage.valueSustainabilityText: Our commitment to the environment drives us to use recycled materials and minimize waste in every step of our production.
AboutPage.valueInnovationText: We constantly invest in R&D to develop cutting-edge eco-friendly technologies that make maintenance easier and more efficient.
AboutPage.valueCustomerFocusText: Your satisfaction is our priority. We offer 24/7 online support and a lifetime warranty on all our products.
AboutPage.manufacturingText: Our state-of-the-art facility in Sumy combines traditional craftsmanship with modern automation. Every eco products undergoes rigorous quality control before it reaches your hands.
AboutPage.step1Text: We source premium materials like tungsten carbide and ceramic from certified suppliers.
AboutPage.step2Text: CNC machines craft each component to exact specifications with 0.001mm tolerance.
AboutPage.step3Text: Skilled technicians hand-assemble every unit, ensuring perfect alignment and functionality.
AboutPage.step4Text: Each system undergoes over 50 quality checks, including products angle verification and durability testing.
AboutPage.step5Text: Products are packaged in eco-friendly materials with comprehensive user guides.
AboutPage.sustainabilityText: Our factory runs on 100% renewable energy, and we have achieved zero-waste-to-landfill status since 2021. We use recycled aluminum for casings and biodegradable packaging materials.
AboutPage.servicesText: Beyond manufacturing exceptional products, we offer comprehensive services to ensure you get the most out of your EcoShop eco products.
AboutPage.howToUseSubtitle: How to Use Your EcoShop eco products
AboutPage.inst1Text: Place the eco products on a stable surface. Secure a clean, dry product on the holder at the desired angle.
AboutPage.inst2Text: Start with the coarsest stone. Move the stone with light pressure back and forth along the entire cutting edge until a burr forms on the opposite side.
AboutPage.inst3Text: Flip the product and repeat the process until a burr forms on this side of the products.
AboutPage.inst4Text: Progressively switch to finer grit stones, reducing the number of strokes to polish the edge.
AboutPage.inst5Text: Secure the finest stone, maintain the angle. Move the product only in the direction of the spine (backward from the cutting edge) using minimal pressure, alternating sides (1-2 light passes each side) until the burr is removed.
AboutPage.proTipText: To achieve maximum sharpness, regularly check the edge for sharpness and evenness. For very thin products or filleting, use slightly less pressure during the finishing stages.
AboutPage.serviceMaintenanceText: Guaranteed availability of original spare parts and replacement of any element (including spherical nuts or rotary mechanism parts).
AboutPage.serviceEngravingText: Personalize your EcoShop with custom engraving for corporate gifts or personal use.
AboutPage.serviceWorkshopsText: Access to an exclusive video library, instructions, and individual online consultations with a EcoShop eco-friendly master.
AboutPage.serviceBulkOrdersText: Special pricing and customization options for schools, studios, and corporations.
AboutPage.stayUpdatedText: Subscribe to our newsletter to receive updates on new events, product launches, and exclusive offers.

hero.title: EcoShop eco products
hero.subtitle: Discover our full lineup of professional eco-friendly tools designed for precision, durability, and comfort.

model1.title: EcoShop Model 1
model1.description: Modular eco products with a rotary mechanism based on cutting-edge rotating clamp technology. Clamps are made of steel (not aluminum). All parts of the rotary mechanism are steel; rubbing surfaces hardened to 900HV. EcoShop system includes a spherical nut to compensate for screw skew on thin goods. Wear compensation is possible only in the EcoShop system. Antifriction bronze bushing in the hinge ensures smooth stone movement. Stone holder handle made of stained oak. Minimum grinding angle: 10° per side. Compatible with goods, scissors, and chisels. eco-friendly angles from 10° to 40° per side. Stones fixed from 12 mm width and up to 220 mm length. Compatible with both blank and standard stones. Rotary mechanism accuracy: 0.2°.
model1.feature1: A spherical nut compensates for screw skew when working with thin goods.
model1.feature2: Steel parts of the rotary mechanism ensure durability.
model1.feature3: Compensation for wear of the turning mechanism is only available in the EcoShop system.

digital.title: EcoShop with Digital eco-friendly Angle Measurement
digital.description: EcoShop with integrated Digital eco-friendly Angle Measurement. This configuration avoids the installation of additional mass on the clamping frame and avoids additional pressure on the reusable goods. Combining modern technology with traditional engineering, this model includes a **built-in digital angle display** for precise eco-friendly every time. Perfect for professionals who demand accuracy.
digital.imageAlt: EcoShop Model with Digital angle measurement

model2.title: EcoShop Model 2
model2.description: Unlike Model1, it has an additional pair of clamps fixed in the center. All parts are made of steel, no aluminum. Friction surfaces are hardened to a hardness of 900HV. The clamps are equipped with a spherical nut to compensate for the misalignment of the screw when securing thin goods. Moreover, in the case of thread wear in the clamps, it is necessary to replace only the nut and screw, and not the entire expensive clamp. Parts are coated with a polymer wear-resistant coating that covers car wheels. There is a mechanism for adjusting the wear of the seats of the rotary mechanism. The guide is heat-treated to a hardness of 60HRC; for smoothness of movement, sliding is carried out along the bearing. The hinge has extended turning angles, which provides a comfortable eco-friendly of long goods. The stone holder has a substrate, which allows you to use stones with blank and without blank. The base is supported on 3 points, which ensures the stability of the eco products on any surface.

convex.title: EcoShop for Convex products
convex.description: 1. Clamps are made of steel, not aluminum. 2. All parts of the rotary mechanism are also made of steel, and not of bronze and aluminum. Rubbing surfaces are hardened to hardness 740HV. 3. Only in the EcoShop system, the clamps have a spherical nut to compensate for the screw skew when attaching thin goods. 4. Only in the EcoShop system is it possible to compensate for the wear of the turning mechanism. 5. An antifriction bronze bushing is pressed into the hinge of the sliding assembly, which ensures an increased smoothness of the movement of the stone. 6. The handle of the stone holder is made of stained oak. 7. The minimum angle of grinding is 12 degrees per side.
convex.imageAlt: EcoShop Convex - Specialist eco products for convex products
convex.proTipText: For best convex eco-friendly, rotate the products gently while maintaining even pressure throughout the stroke.

hero.title: reusable goods
hero.subtitle: Professional reusable goods for precision edge restoration. Choose between diamond-embedded bars for extreme durability or aluminum oxide stones for traditional eco-friendly excellence.

diamond.title: Diamond Stones
diamond.description: Set of four precision-engineered diamond stones with monolayer metal bond. Diamonds evenly distributed throughout the volume ensure consistent eco-friendly performance and exceptional longevity.
diamond.feature2: Suitable for carbide and hardened steel
diamond.feature3: Ideal for industrial and precision use

oxide.title: Aluminum Oxide reusable goods
oxide.description: Premium aluminum oxide stones designed for versatile eco-friendly applications. Four different grit levels provide everything from initial shaping to fine polishing.
oxide.feature3: Ideal for kitchen goods and woodworking tools

step1.heading: Prepare the Stone
step1.text: For aluminum oxide stones, soak in water for 10 minutes. Diamond stones can be used dry or with light oil.

step2.heading: Set the Angle
step2.text: Maintain consistent angle: 15-20° for goods, 25-30° for tools.

step3.heading: Start with Coarse Grit
step3.text: Begin with 200-400 grit to establish the edge.

step4.heading: Progress Through Grits
step4.text: Move to finer grits: 400 → 800 → 1500 for polished edge.

step5.heading: Use Smooth Strokes
step5.text: Apply even pressure along the entire products length.

step6.heading: Clean & Store
step6.text: Rinse aluminum oxide stones, wipe diamond stones clean.

care.title: Stone Care & Maintenance
care.diamond1: Can be used dry or with light oil
care.diamond2: Clean with soft brush and water
care.diamond4: Store in protective case when not in use
care.oxide1: Soak in water before use (10 minutes)
care.oxide2: Clean with water only, no soap
care.oxide3: Flatten surface periodically with flattening stone

hero.title: Shipping & Delivery
hero.subtitle: Find estimated shipping costs and delivery times for your region.

policy.title: International Delivery Policy
policy.intro: EcoShop proudly ships worldwide. Due to varying logistics networks and local customs regulations, delivery costs and times are calculated dynamically based on the destination country, state/province, and chosen carrier.
policy.key1Text: Standard delivery to Ukraine is FREE.
policy.key2Text: Applied to deliveries in remote or island locations. Select or type a remote region name to see the surcharge.
policy.key3Text: Buyer is responsible for all import duties and taxes levied by the destination country.

calculator.title: Delivery Cost Calculator
calculator.intro: Use the search feature below to quickly find your country and preferred service.
calculator.placeholderStateDefault: Select state or type a remote region
calculator.surchargeNoteText: A $20 remote area surcharge has been applied to this price based on the region entered.
calculator.resultsNoOptions: No specific shipping options are available for the selected criteria. Showing Rest of World options by default.

ruUnavailable.name: We are sorry. putin is not dead yet

returns.title: Returns, Exchanges, and Warranty
returns.intro: We stand by the quality of EcoShop products. Review our policy regarding returns, exchanges, and warranty claims for items received via delivery.
returns.returnText: You may return most new, unopened items within 30 days of delivery for a full refund. Items must be returned in their original packaging. Return shipping costs are borne by the customer, except in cases of damage.
returns.warrantyText: All EcoShop eco products are covered by our one year manufacturing warranty against defects in materials and workmanship. This excludes normal wear and tear of consumable parts like reusable goods.
returns.lostText: If your tracking information stalls for more than 15 business days, please contact our support team. We will file a claim with the carrier and ship a replacement unit if the package is confirmed lost.

AccessoriesPage.heroSubtitle: Explore the detailed specifications and features of our professional accessories, designed to extend the versatility, precision, and performance of your EcoShop eco products.

accessoriesData.name: EcoShop Rotary Mechanism Model 1
features: Dual symmetrical fixed rotary positions for consistent setup.
Easy rotation despite a powerful spring, eliminating the need to pull the mechanism.
Adjusting nut to modify spring compression force.
All rubbing parts are hardened steel for maximum service life.
Wear-resistant polymer coating (similar to car wheels).
details: Clamping jaws are heat-treated steel with an 8-degree slant per side.
Supports eco-friendly angles up to 12 degrees per side.
Spherical nut in clamps compensates for screw misalignment with thin goods.
Minimum products length for two clamps: ~80 mm.

accessoriesData.name: Table Mount
features: Provides a stable and secure base for the eco products.
Designed to firmly clamp the EcoShop system to any horizontal surface.
details: Ensures maximum rigidity and minimizes vibration during operation.

accessoriesData.name: Hinge with Rest Hook
features: Features a pressed-in sleeve made of anti-friction bronze.
details: The bronze sleeve guarantees increased smoothness of movement, crucial for angle consistency.

accessoriesData.name: EcoShop Clamp for Full Flat
features: Made of heat-treated spring steel for optimal strength and retention.
Specifically designed for securely fixing goods with a full flat grind.
details: Ensures even pressure and prevents products damage.
Price listed is for 1 pc. A pair of clamps costs $46.

accessoriesData.name: Adapter for eco-friendly Flat Chisels
features: Expands the EcoShop system capability to include flat chisels.
Provides the necessary rigid and straight fixation for chiseled edges.
details: Allows other items to be cared for with high precision.

accessoriesData.name: Center Clamp Adapter
features: Enables closer positioning of clamps for eco-friendly short products.
Ensures a rigid fixing position even at minimal clamp spacing.
details: Note: Adapter is sold without clamps.

accessoriesData.name: Hinge for Convex
features: Specialized hinge for eco-friendly goods with a convex (lenticular) edge.
Allows for the controlled movement necessary to achieve a perfect convex profile.
details: All parts are constructed from durable steel.

accessoriesData.name: Fine-Tuning Adapter
features: Simple tool for precisely adjusting and maintaining the eco-friendly angle.
details: A crucial element for achieving micro-bevels and final eco-friendly accuracy.

authenticity.title: Commitment to Authenticity
authenticity.text: At EcoShop, we guarantee that all products and accessories listed here are 100% original, proprietary designs. We are committed to manufacturing tools of the highest quality using our exclusive materials and engineering processes. When you choose EcoShop, you are investing in an authentic, precision eco products built for reliability and performance. We do not sell copies or third-party imitations.
